TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Mangcelan, title = Mangcelan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mangcelan} }

S.FORM: == Mangcelan == u sulit nu Hulam śĽŅŤá™ÁĄ∂ťÉ®ŤźĹ u siwkay nu niyazu' i Hualien a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Mangcelan. u kasalumaluma' nu Mangcelan sa, 164 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 502 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 460 ku tademaw, pakalatu 92%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 42 ku tademaw, pakalatu 8%. u sausi nu cidekay a tademaw u kasabinacadan, Pangcah(Amis) 85%, zumazuma 5%. u Pangcah a niyazu' u kasabinacadan, Pangcah(Amis) 81%, Yuwatan(Bunun) 1%, Sakizaya 1%, zumazuma 8%. u pangca sa, u cidekay nu Taywan Incumin. tusa a bataan a mang ku tademaw. mueneng i Kalinku i Pusung atu i dadipasan nu bayu'an. satuuday a cidekay u Pangcah. u Sakizaya a tademaw izaw tu ku Sakizaya a tademaw itini, namabulaw i 1878 tayni milimek. siiluc tu tina niyazu'. nasulitan ni Liaw Socen. u cidekay nu Taywan Yincumin:
S.PHON: == maŇč ¶…ôr~…ĺan == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam ***** u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu maŇč ¶…ôr~…ĺan. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu maŇč ¶…ôr~…ĺan sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu *%. u sausi nu ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw u kasabina ¶adan, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) **%, zumazuma *%. u paŇč ¶ańß a nijazu Ē~ ° u kasabina ¶adan, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) **%, juwatan(bunun) *%, sakizaja *%, zumazuma *%. u paŇč ¶a sa, u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan in ¶umin. tusa a bataan a maŇč ku tad…ômaw. mu…ôn…ôŇč i kar~…ĺinku i pusuŇč atu i dadipasan nu baju Ē~ °an. satuudaj a ¶id…ôkaj u paŇč ¶ańß. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw izaw tu ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw itini, namabur~…ĺaw i **** tajni mir~…ĺim…ôk. siir~…ĺu ¶ tu tina nijazu Ē~ °. nasur~…ĺitan ni r~…ĺiaw so ¶…ôn. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin:
S.FORM: == Mangcelan == u sulit nu Hulam śĽŅŤá™ÁĄ∂ťÉ®ŤźĹ u siwkay nu niyazu' i Hualien a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Mangcelan. u kasalumaluma' nu Mangcelan sa, 164 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 502 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 460 ku tademaw, pakalatu 92%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 42 ku tademaw, pakalatu 8%. u sausi nu cidekay a tademaw u kasabinacadan, Pangcah(Amis) 85%, zumazuma 5%. u Pangcah a niyazu' u kasabinacadan, Pangcah(Amis) 81%, Yuwatan(Bunun) 1%, Sakizaya 1%, zumazuma 8%. u pangca sa, u cidekay nu Taywan Incumin. tusa a bataan a mang ku tademaw. mueneng i Kalinku i Pusung atu i dadipasan nu bayu'an. satuuday a cidekay u Pangcah. u Sakizaya a tademaw izaw tu ku Sakizaya a tademaw itini, namabulaw i 1878 tayni milimek. siiluc tu tina niyazu'. nasulitan ni Liaw Socen. u cidekay nu Taywan Yincumin:
S.PHON: == maŇč ¶…ôr~…ĺan == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam ***** u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu maŇč ¶…ôr~…ĺan. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu maŇč ¶…ôr~…ĺan sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu *%. u sausi nu ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw u kasabina ¶adan, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) **%, zumazuma *%. u paŇč ¶ańß a nijazu Ē~ ° u kasabina ¶adan, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) **%, juwatan(bunun) *%, sakizaja *%, zumazuma *%. u paŇč ¶a sa, u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan in ¶umin. tusa a bataan a maŇč ku tad…ômaw. mu…ôn…ôŇč i kar~…ĺinku i pusuŇč atu i dadipasan nu baju Ē~ °an. satuudaj a ¶id…ôkaj u paŇč ¶ańß. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw izaw tu ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw itini, namabur~…ĺaw i **** tajni mir~…ĺim…ôk. siir~…ĺu ¶ tu tina nijazu Ē~ °. nasur~…ĺitan ni r~…ĺiaw so ¶…ôn. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin:
